name: Laguna Honda Hospital
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Assisted living facility feasibility study : Laguna Honda Hospital and Rehabilitation Center : draft
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept,Anshen & Allen,Gordon H. Chong + Associates
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2007 feasibility study plans 140 assisted-living units on the Laguna Honda Hospital campus as part of an on-site continuum of long-term care.

documents.title: Laguna Honda Hospital replacement : final environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2002 final environmental impact report certifies the Laguna Honda Hospital Replacement project at 375 Laguna Honda Boulevard.

documents.title: Laguna Honda Hospital institutional master plan
documents.creator: Kaplan McLaughlin Diaz,San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of Public Health
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1994 institutional master plan reviews the hospital's condition and history — tracing the site to an 1867 shelter — and argues for replacing the aging facility.

documents.title: Laguna Honda Hospital historic background report, October 2001
documents.creator: Impact Sciences, Inc,Architectural Resources Group
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2001 historic background report evaluates the architectural significance of the Laguna Honda hospital buildings, including John Reid Jr.'s Mission Revival Main Hospital Building.

documents.title: Agenda
documents.creator: Laguna Honda Hospital. Replacement Planning Committee,San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of Public Health,San Francisco (Calif.). Health Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1999 Replacement Planning Committee agenda covers the replacement bond, community outreach and a report to the Board of Supervisors.

documents.title: The San Francisco Department of Public Health annual report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of Public Health
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1979 Public Health annual report notes a 1978 federal inspection of Laguna Honda and its billing function and role in senior services.

documents.title: Laguna Honda Hospital replacement : comments and responses
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Planning Dept
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2002 comments-and-responses volume finalizes the replacement EIR around the sponsor's Partial Preservation Alternative Three.

documents.title: Into the 21st century : building a new facility to continue Laguna Honda Hospital's mission
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of Public Health,San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of Public Works,Kaplan McLaughlin Diaz,Gordon H. Chong + Associates
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1992 bond program report proposes a $548.4 million Bond Program to build a replacement facility for Laguna Honda Hospital.
